title: Hoochie Coochie Man
album: One More Mile: Chess Collectibles, Vol. 1
why_this_song: Hoochie Coochie Man by Muddy Waters (1954) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Then the world wanna know"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Everybody knows I'm him"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Everybody knows I'm him"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Well, you know I'm a Hoochie Coochie Man"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Well, you know I'm a Hoochie Coochie Man"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

I got a black cat bone
Yeah, you know I'm a Hoochie Coochie Man

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "know" in the whole song?

I got a black cat bone

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Hoochie Coochie Man" was released in 1954. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Hoochie Coochie Man" foi lançada em 1954. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Hoochie Coochie Man" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Hoochie Coochie Man" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
